label: Multi-agent
hint: Let the current conversation act as the leader, coordinating several subagents to work together on a task.

auto.hint: The leader automatically decides the number, shape, and models of subagents based on task complexity.

manual.empty: No subagents yet — click "+ Add subagent" below to configure one.
manual.incomplete: Pick a type and model for every subagent before enabling.

subagents.title: Subagents
subagents.empty: No subagents yet — the leader will spawn them after you send a task.
